top_signals.title: Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports
top_signals.summary: Oil producers are building or contemplating new pipeline projects to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, but this infrastructure is still vulnerable, analysts said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
